standard_prompt.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

metrics.standard_input: Prompt: 'a cat sitting on a table', 28 steps

device_coarsening._comment: Exact-identifier matching (B5 fix). The old raw_prefix rows binned whole hardware generations onto one chip — e.g. prefix 'Mac16' mapped the base-M4 MacBook Pro 14-inch (Mac16,1, 120 GB/s) into mac-m4-max (546 GB/s), a ~4.5x bandwidth gap that corrupted cohort medians and any physics gate. Identifiers verified 2026-07-03 against Apple's identify-your-Mac pages (support.apple.com/en-us/108052 MacBook Pro, 102869 MacBook Air, 102852 Mac mini, 108054 iMac, 102231 Mac Studio) and AppleDB (api.appledb.dev/device/main.json) for the chip-bin splits and iPhone/iPad rows; per-row 'source' cites the primary reference. Unknown identifiers coarsen to 'unknown' — never guess.
